WONDERING HOW


It ALL HAPPENED

Can't Just "Savvy" Some of Cham
Der of Commerce Election


Features.

pages.raw_text:
There are some men around the
town today who are still trying to
figure out just how certain things
and election Of the Chamber of
Commerce last night, and why it
happened" just so. Had those
with the greatest interests at stake
consulted a trance medium before
gathering about the long, crowded
tables Of steaming viands they
could not have pulled the strings
to better advantage In getting just
about what they desired.


OF course no one should be SO un-
just as to even intimate that the
thing was "fixed" beforehand and
to queens taste, though it would
not require the perceptiveness of
q Sherlock Holmes to figure out
who are the Queens" in this par
ticuIar case.


A. M. Dewey, man who it is
declared is much interested in
railroad projects through the Okla
hogan country and with good
sized interest in real estate, which
1t is said can easily be benefited by
the aid of the influence of the
board of the Chamber of Commerce,
moved that a committee of three be
appointed by the chair to nominate
sufficient number of men to in
crease the membership of the board
of trustees to 81.


PROTEST IN VAIN.
